summary: Comprehensive testing of 3 new features: searchable CPU/GPU dropdowns with brand grouping, FPS History chart with quality toggles, and Compare mode at /compare. All 34 backend tests pass (100%), all frontend tests pass. All features work correctly.

features_verified.searchable_cpu_dropdown: PASS - CPU dropdown opens with search input, typing filters across Intel/AMD groups
features_verified.searchable_gpu_dropdown: PASS - GPU dropdown opens with search input, typing filters across NVIDIA/AMD groups
features_verified.cpu_brand_grouping: PASS - Intel and AMD brands visually grouped with colored headers
features_verified.gpu_brand_grouping: PASS - NVIDIA and AMD brands visually grouped with colored headers
features_verified.history_api_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/history returns recent calculations from MongoDB
features_verified.history_chart_renders: PASS - Bar chart displays on homepage with 'RECENT CALCULATIONS' title
features_verified.history_quality_toggles: PASS - Low/Medium/High/Ultra toggle buttons present and clickable
features_verified.compare_page_loads: PASS - /compare page loads with two build forms side by side
features_verified.compare_cpu_dropdowns: PASS - Both Build A and B have working searchable CPU dropdowns
features_verified.compare_gpu_dropdowns: PASS - Both Build A and B have working searchable GPU dropdowns
features_verified.compare_calculate_works: PASS - Calculate buttons work for both builds, show results
features_verified.compare_head_to_head_table: PASS - Head-to-Head table appears after both builds calculated with FPS diff and percentages
features_verified.compare_link_in_header: PASS - 'Compare Builds' link visible in header, navigates to /compare
features_verified.back_to_calculator_link: PASS - 'Calculator' link from /compare returns to homepage
features_verified.main_calculator_regression: PASS - Full flow still works (select CPU/GPU, calculate, results display)
features_verified.product_cards_regression: PASS - Product cards show 'CHECK PRICE ON AMAZON' buttons (13 found)

context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 new features added to FPS Calculator: 1) SearchableHardwareSelect.jsx provides searchable dropdowns for CPU/GPU with brand grouping - data-testid pattern: 'cpu-select', 'cpu-select-search', 'gpu-select', 'gpu-select-search'. 2) HistoryChart.jsx displays bar chart of recent calculations using recharts - data-testid: 'history-chart', quality toggles: 'history-quality-low/medium/high/ultra'. 3) ComparePage.jsx at /compare allows side-by-side build comparison - data-testid: 'compare-cpu-A', 'compare-gpu-A', 'compare-calc-A', 'compare-results-A', 'compare-table'. Backend URL: https://fps-calculator-7.preview.emergentagent.com. All 34 backend tests pass including 6 new History API tests.
